northStar: Make Macra's trial-start path repeatable without breaking trust.

activeExperiment.knownIssue: Saved /admin/experiments results snapshot is stale from 2026-06-16 and still reflects retired hard-paywall configuration.
activeExperiment.firstTask: Refresh/backfill experiment results so decisions are not made from stale variant data.

latestSavedRun.source: AppsFlyer aggregate report aligned with saved Macra Scoreboard
latestSavedRun.interpretation: Apple Search Ads is outperforming organic on conversion quality, but this is an early signal and not proof of product-market fit.

daily: Each agent produces one finding and one proposed action
Nora chooses at most one operational change unless something is broken
weekly: Decide whether the active experiment should continue
Review trial starts, paid conversions, and cancel feedback
Promote, pause, or design the next experiment
